name: Karina Villa
bio: Karina Villa is an Illinois State Senator (25th District, West Chicago/DuPage County area). She's running for Illinois Comptroller in the 4-way Democratic primary on March 17, 2026. Villa is the close second in fundraising behind Croke and has been vocal about campaign finance — criticizing Croke for accepting super PAC money and Republican donor contributions.

jacket.note: Close second in fundraising behind Croke. Has publicly criticized Croke for PAC and Republican donor money.
